---
title: "Exploring Storms"
author: "KINSON GAO"
execute:
  echo: false
format: html
---

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages(
  library(tidyverse)
)
""

storms |>
  count(year, name = "n_storms") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n_storms)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "Named Storms per Year",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of Named Storms"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
